title: Full opponent-response pressure features
summary: F1 pit calls are reactive to competitors: undercut, overcut, and covering rivals.
rationale: F1 pit calls are reactive to competitors: undercut, overcut, and covering rivals. A prior attempt used only one rival-ahead tyre-life feature; broader local-field context should be more informative.
implementation_hint: For each Race-Lap, sort by Position and add lag/lead features for cars ahead and behind: TyreLife, Compound, Stint, LapTime_Delta, Position_Change, and whether they pitted on the current/previous lap. Add band counts such as top-3/top-5 same-stint old-tyre count and immediate rival older/newer tyre flags.
expected_effect: Should capture cover-the-undercut and react-to-nearby-car patterns that static driver/race features miss.
risk: Requires careful index alignment after sorting; noisy if Position is post-pit rather than on-track order at decision time.
